ground_truth.title: Founding Farmers Co. Catering & Events
ground_truth.main_content:
OFF-SITE FULL SERVICE EVENT CATERING + DROP OFF CATERING

Founding Farmers Co. Catering & Events

Our food, drink, and hospitality now goes beyond our restaurants to your home, office, and any venue of your choice. With Founding Farmers Co. Catering & Events, our team can help plan your event from start to finish, including customized menus, event design, service teams, bartenders, and more. We also offer drop off catering for office events, parties, and beyond.

Learn More About Off-Site Catering & Events

Best Restaurant Private Dining

Large Parties & Private Dining at Founding Farmers

Looking to plan an event in one of our restaurants? Our restaurant teams are happy to plan your next event around our tables. Check out our large parties and private dining information for more details.
